name: Kiss of Repose
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG +[StateArg1]% During this exploration, every time the wielder kills an enemy, their Crit. Rate +2% and Exalt Base DMG +[StateArg2]%, up to 10 times. If the current Realm is {Caro}, the wielder gains an extra [StateArg4] Aliemus when they directly consume {Embryo} (cooldown 3 turns).
